statement: The graph-norm recovery sequence can be chosen so that R_aug,N f_N -> R_aug f in the transported graph-dual trace topology.

graphRecoveryInputStatus.label: graph recovery input
graphRecoveryInputStatus.reason: Finite core functions recover f in the completed graph norm.

traceConvergenceInputStatus.label: augmented trace convergence input
traceConvergenceInputStatus.reason: R_aug,N converges strongly to R_aug on graph-norm bounded recovery sequences.

traceRecoverySequenceStatus.label: trace recovery sequence
traceRecoverySequenceStatus.reason: Graph recovery gives f_N -> f in V; strong graph-dual trace convergence then gives R_aug,N f_N -> R_aug f.

proof: Take the graph recovery sequence from the graph recovery theorem.
Apply strong graph-dual convergence of the augmented trace rows.
Use the triangle inequality in the transported trace norm.
Conclude simultaneous recovery of f and R_aug f.
